LanguageData.VPEPD_VCE_BakeryOven_Electric.descriptio: An electric oven designed for baking cookies, pastries, and cakes with reliable, consistent heat distribution for perfect results every time. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VPEPD_VCE_BakeryOven_Electric.label: electric bakery oven
LanguageData.VPEPD_VCE_BakeryOven_Fueled.description: A wood-fueled oven designed for baking cookies, pastries, and cakes. Its steady heat ensures even cooking and sweet results. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VPEPD_VCE_BakeryOven_Fueled.label: fueled bakery oven
